title: Stefano Gemma
text: Home * People * Stefano Gemma Stefano Gemma at CIPS 2001 [1] Stefano Gemma , an Italian IT consultant, owner of L'Informatica di Gemma Stefano [2] , and as computer chess programmer, founding member of the Gruppo Scacchi e Informatica , the Italian Computer Chess Association, and author of the chess programs Drago , Raffaela [3] , Freccia , Satana [4] , and Sabrina [5] .
